title: aquilegia buergeriana f. pallidiflora
intro: Aquilegia buergeriana f. pallidiflora, commonly known as the pale-flowered Schneider's columbine, is a flowering plant species within the Aquilegia genus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat fever, cough, and other respiratory issues. The health benefits of Aquilegia buergeriana f. pallidiflora include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Herbal preparations of this plant often involve drying or infusing its flowers and leaves to create teas, infusions, or topical remedies.
